elements.original_description: A single white envelope with a red stamp and a dollar sign on it, placed on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a single white envelope with a red stamp featuring a bold black dollar sign symbol on a pure white background, clean flat vector art style, high contrast, no shading, gradients, or textures, sharp lines, centered composition, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
